title: List Calculations
description: Learn to use sum() and perform calculations on your harvest data.

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: Now for one of the most useful list functions: sum()! It adds all the numbers in your list together.

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So instead of adding each number manually, sum() does it all at once?

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: Exactly! If you have [3, 5, 2, 4], sum(myList) returns 14. It's perfect for calculating total harvests!

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: Let's try it! Create a list with several numbers, then use sum() to calculate the total.

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: This will save so much time compared to adding each number separately!

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: That's the power of programming! Let the computer do the tedious work.

postDialogues.name: Manu
postDialogues.content: Perfect! You've calculated your first sum. Now let's use this with real farming data.

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: Here's a real scenario: harvest wheat 3 times, append each to a list, then use sum() to get your total yield!

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: So I can see exactly how productive my farming was!

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: Exactly! This is how farmers track their productivity. Let's do it!

postDialogues.name: Manu
postDialogues.content: Excellent! You're tracking and analyzing your farming data like a professional!

phases.title: Average Harvest
phases.description: Calculate averages with sum and length

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: Want to know your average harvest per plot? Divide sum by length: sum(myList) / len(myList)

preDialogues.name: Qubit
preDialogues.content: Oh! So I can use sum() and length together to get the average?

preDialogues.name: Manu
preDialogues.content: Exactly! This tells you how efficient each harvest is. Try it with some harvest data!

postDialogues.name: Manu
postDialogues.content: Outstanding! You're analyzing data like a data scientist. One more quest to master lists completely!

postDialogues.name: Qubit
postDialogues.content: I'm ready for the ultimate list challenge!
